Adds an AND logical operator between conditions.

avg(String) - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder

cached() - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder
Enables caching for this query with default settings.

cached(long) - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder
Enables caching for this query with specified time-to-live.
cached(String) - Method in class com.github.query4j.core.impl.DynamicQueryBuilder
 
cached(String) - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder
Enables caching for this query in the specified cache region.
closeGroup() - Method in class com.github.query4j.core.impl.DynamicQueryBuilder
 
closeGroup() - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder
Closes the current group of conditions (equivalent to closing parentheses).

count() - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder
Executes a count query and returns the number of matching results.

count(String) - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder
Adds a COUNT(fieldName) aggregation function.

countAll() - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder
Adds a COUNT(*) aggregation function.
countAsync() - Method in class com.github.query4j.core.impl.DynamicQueryBuilder
 
countAsync() - Method in interface com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuilder
Executes a count query asynchronously.

D

DynamicQuery<T> - Interface in com.github.query4j.core
Represents a fully built query that can be executed.

Immutable, thread-safe implementation of QueryBuilder interface.

Base exception for all dynamic query builder errors.

Constructs a new DynamicQueryException with the specified detail message and cause.

Constructs a new DynamicQueryException with the specified cause.

Represents a query predicate that can be serialized to SQL.

Q

QueryBuilder<T> - Interface in com.github.query4j.core
Core interface for dynamic query building with fluent API design.
QueryBuildException - Exception in com.github.query4j.core
Exception thrown when a query building operation fails due to invalid input, unsupported syntax, or validation problems.

Constructs a new QueryBuildException with the specified detail message.
QueryBuildException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuildException
Constructs a new QueryBuildException with the specified detail message and cause.
QueryBuildException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.github.query4j.core.QueryBuildException
Constructs a new QueryBuildException with the specified cause.
QueryExecutionException - Exception in com.github.query4j.core
Exception thrown when a query execution fails unexpectedly.
QueryExecutionException(String) - Constructor for exception com.github.query4j.core.QueryExecutionException
Constructs a new QueryExecutionException with the specified detail message.
QueryExecutionException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.github.query4j.core.QueryExecutionException
Constructs a new QueryExecutionException with the specified detail message and cause.
QueryExecutionException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.github.query4j.core.QueryExecutionException
Constructs a new QueryExecutionException with the specified cause.

Holds execution metadata for queries.

V

Validates that the given field name is valid for use in predicates.

Validates that the given operator is in the allowed whitelist.
validateParameterName(String) - Static method in class com.github.query4j.core.criteria.FieldValidator
Validates that the given parameter name is valid for use in SQL placeholders.
